creator: razwan.mokhtar@gmail.com
text:
I tried to build packages for sysutils/beats7 but came  out with errors.

=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 49098, actual 26808)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go-plist-591f970eefbbeb04d7b37f334a0c4c3256e32876_GL0.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go-plist-591f970eefbbeb04d7b37f334a0c4c3256e32876_GL0.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 49098, actual 49099
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/beats7
*** Error code 1
